=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: SM must commit all in-flight working tree diffs before invoking gate validators
Gate 3c: always verify committed code, not working tree state
Background Agent Silent Write Failure: Verify File System State Before Advancing to Gate 3b
Batch bugfix sessions must establish a clean worktree from main before spawning work agents
